title: Show a low-stock hint in the inventory list without changing order imports.

project.name: Show a low-stock hint in the inventory list without changing order imports.

prd_intake.plain_language_problem: Show a low-stock hint in the inventory list without changing order imports.
desired_outcomes: Inventory list displays an inline 'Low stock' badge after the SKU when qty_available_units <= replenishment_floor_units.
success_proof: A screenshot or component test shows an inline 'Low stock' badge after the SKU when qty_available_units <= replenishment_floor_units.
boundaries: Do not change order import behavior.

question_trace.question: What do you want to improve or clarify?
question_trace.answer: 库存列表想加一个低库存提示，别影响下单导入。

question_trace.question: 我先不把任何文件当执行范围。需要确认：入口是不是库存列表、现有字段从哪里来、低库存判定规则、可见文案位置，以及下单导入保持不动。
question_trace.answer: 项目里字段不是普通 quantity，是 qty_available_units 和 replenishment_floor_units，小于等于补货线就是低库存。

question_trace.question: 我已读取 src/pages/inventory-list.tsx，确认字段是 qty_available_units 和 replenishment_floor_units；规则是 qty_available_units <= replenishment_floor_units。还缺 UI 文案、展示位置、样式来源、以及你接受的验收证据。
question_trace.answer: 文案就叫 Low stock，放在 SKU 后面，如果项目有现有 badge 组件就沿用，否则用当前列表字体做内联文本标签且不新增颜色；截图或组件测试能看到 affected SKU 有 badge 就可以。

question_trace.question: 计划收敛为一个 UI 原子任务：只在库存列表 SKU 后显示 Low stock badge，不碰导入。现在需要你显式批准后才生成 PRD。
question_trace.answer: 确认，就按这个计划生成 PRD。

handoff.plain_language_goal: Inventory list displays an inline 'Low stock' badge after the SKU when qty_available_units <= replenishment_floor_units.
handoff.user_story: As store manager, I want Inventory list displays an inline 'Low stock' badge after the SKU when qty_available_units <= replenishment_floor_units., so that they no longer rely on the current behavior: Managers only see raw inventory counts in the inventory list..
handoff.current_behavior: Managers only see raw inventory counts in the inventory list. Evidence: Agent read src/pages/inventory-list.tsx and confirmed it renders qty_available_units and replenishment_floor_units in inventory rows.
